title: General availability of the Payments API
description: The Payments API is now GA. Create and retrieve payments, with idempotency-key support on all write endpoints.

title: Switched amount fields to minor units
description: Monetary amounts are now expressed as integer minor units (e.g. cents) instead of decimal strings. Update integrations to send and parse integers.

title: Resolved duplicate webhook deliveries on retry
description: Transient 5xx responses could trigger duplicate payment.succeeded webhooks. Deliveries are now de-duplicated by event id within the retry window.
